description:
Ante is entrepreneurial since his 11th year. He built social media platforms before Myspace or Facebook existed. Co-founded few companies, sold some, creating a new one at the moment.  He’s Catholic that knows some swear words;) He’s the creator of LOOD’s logo and brand feel. One of my favorite people in the world. My cousin!

This podcast was recorded in 2018 in one Airbnb apartment in Berlin. We talked about war in Croatia and Ante’s immigration to Germany. We talked about entrepreneurship, designing people happy, religion, empathy, ego, corporate cultures, and a lot more. Enjoy!
-
Vinko Mihaljević
https://www.linkedin.com/in/vinkomihaljevic/
